betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Basic Metals§f

§aSmelt and process the foundational metal ingots and their derived materials!§f

§e9§f base metals — Copper, Tin, Silver, Lead, Aluminum, Nickel, Platinum, Iridium, Mana Infused — each available as ingot, nugget, dust, gear, plate, coin, and block.

§6Key Recipes§f:
§b• Ingot§f — Smelt ore 1:1 or craft §e9§f nuggets
§b• Dust§f — §e1§f ore → §e2§f dust in Pulverizer
§b• Gear§f — §e4§f ingots + §e1§f Iron Rod
§b• Plate§f — §e2§f ingots
§b• Coin§f — §e1§f ingot + §e1§f plate
§b• Block§f — §e9§f ingots (beacon base, no mob spawns)

§6Induction Smelter Boosts§f:
Ore + Sand → §e2§f ingots (§e5%§f Rich Slag)
Ore + Rich Slag → §e3§f ingots (§e75%§f Slag)
Ore + Cinnabar → §e3§f ingots + Gold Ingot
Pyrotheum Dust + ore (shapeless) → §e1§f ingot
Petrotheum Dust + ore (shapeless) → §e2§f dust
